mapper.select:
SELECT approval.id , approval.deleted , approval.created_at as createdAt , approval.modified_at as modifiedAt
, approval.step_status as stepStatus , approval.space_id as spaceId
, MAX(CASE WHEN user_approval.approval_role = 'ASSIGNOR' THEN user_approval.user_id END) as assignorId , MAX(CASE WHEN user_approval.approval_role = 'ASSIGNEE' THEN user_approval.user_id END) as assigneeId , MAX(CASE WHEN user_approval.approval_role = 'ADMIN' THEN user_approval.user_id END) as adminId
FROM approval LEFT JOIN user_approval ON approval.id = user_approval.approval_id AND user_approval.deleted = false WHERE approval.id = #{id} GROUP BY approval.id
SELECT user_id FROM user_space WHERE space_id = #{spaceId} AND role = 'USER' AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted = false LIMIT 1
SELECT user_id FROM user_space WHERE space_id = #{spaceId} AND role = 'ADMIN' AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted = false LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM user_space WHERE space_id = #{spaceId} AND role = 'USER' AND status = #{status} AND deleted = false LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(id) > 0 FROM approval WHERE space_id = #{spaceId} AND step_status != 'COMPLETED' AND deleted = false
